sections.heading: Custom Vulnerabilities & Options for Consideration
paragraphs:
1. Insufficient perimeter lighting creates security blind spots
Category: Physical Security
Options for Consideration: Install additional LED security lighting with motion sensors

2. Outdated network equipment increases cyber attack risk
Category: Facility Information
Options for Consideration: Implement network segmentation and upgrade infrastructure

3. Incomplete background check procedures for contractors
Category: Security Plans
Options for Consideration: Establish comprehensive background check requirements
